name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with Bug Hunter itself (not bugs it found in your code)
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce

1. Target codebase (language/framework):
2. Command used: `/bug-hunter ...`
3. Mode: (single-file / small / parallel / loop)
4. Agent runtime: (Pi / Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / other)

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include relevant output from `.bug-hunter/` if possible.

## Environment

- Node.js version:
- Bug Hunter version/commit:
- OS:
- Agent runtime + version:

## Additional context

Paste relevant sections from `.bug-hunter/triage.json`, `findings.md`, `skeptic.md`, or `report.md` if applicable.
